docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,092.00 FILED BY TANCREDI,VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE TOURS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANCREDI,VINCENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EMPIRE TOURS PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID SERVICE AS TO EMPIRE TOURS, NO DESCRIP. OF TITLE OF PARTY SERVED. PERSONAL OR SUBSERV.?
